zh.Kendal, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katharine Strickland於大約1333年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.47歲，母親Cecily Welles33歲。她和Sir John de Ros至少有1個女兒。她去世於1422年5月1日在英國維斯特莫藍德享年90歲。

zh-hans.Kendal, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh-hans.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katharine Strickland于大约1333年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.47岁，母亲Cecily Welles33岁。她和Sir John de Ros至少有1个女儿。她去世于1422年5月1日在英国維斯特莫藍德享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strickland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Great and Little Strickland (Westmorland) or Strickland Ketel and Strickland Roger (also Westmorland). The placenames derive from Old English stīrc ‘stirk, young bullock or heifer’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Katharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Katherine , associated by folk etymology with Greek katharos ‘pure’. This is the preferred spelling in Germany. It is also the one used in the name of the American film star Katharine Hepburn ( 1907–2003 ).

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katharine Strickland was born about 1333, in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, her father, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., was 47 and her mother, Cecily Welles, was 33. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir John de Ros. She died on 1 May 1422, in Westmorland, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katharine Strickland est née environ 1333, à Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., avait 47 ans et sa mère, Cecily Welles, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir John de Ros. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1422, à Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katharine Strickland um 1333 in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. 47 und ihre Mutter Cecily Welles 33. Sie hatte mit Sir John de Ros mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1422 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine Strickland è nata il circa 1333 nel Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Cecily Welles, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir John de Ros. Morì il 1 maggio 1422, nel Westmorland, England, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katharine Stricklandが約1333年にイギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.は47歳，母Cecily Wellesは33歳であった。彼女はSir John de Rosとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1422年5月1日にイギリスウエストモーランドで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katharine Strickland(이)가 대략 1333년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 시즈르그h 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Welles(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Sir John de Ros(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 5월 1일 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine Strickland nasceu aproximadamente 1333, em Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Welles, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sir John de Ros. Ela faleceu em 1 de maio de 1422, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katharine Strickland родилась около 1333 г. в местности сизирг холл, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Welles, 33. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir John de Ros. Она умерла 1 мая 1422 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katharine Strickland nació aproximadamente 1333, en Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., tenía 47 años y su mamá, Cecily Welles, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sir John de Ros. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1422, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años.
